name: Cream Cheese Candy
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Cream cheese, 1/2 of 8 oz pack
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the cream cheese, mint flavoring, and food coloring (if desired).
2. Add powdered sugar.
3. Knead until smooth.
4. Roll into marble-sized balls.
5. Roll balls in granulated sugar.
6. Shape into candy canes or press into decorative molds and unmold on wax paper.
